summary: AI Chatbot Assistant feature fully tested. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend chatbot UI works correctly with all required elements and interactions. LLM integration (GPT-4.1-mini via Emergent LLM key) is working - responses take ~2-8 seconds. Map fly-to functionality works correctly for regional queries.
passed_tests: POST /api/chat endpoint exists and accepts POST requests
POST /api/chat with '50MW en PACA' returns type=search_results with results array
POST /api/chat search results include fly_to with lat/lng/zoom coordinates
POST /api/chat search results have correct structure (name, site_id, score, grid, location)
POST /api/chat results sorted by score descending
POST /api/chat with 'Résumé S3REnR' returns type=summary with region data (IDF, PACA, HdF)
POST /api/chat with general question returns type=text with response
POST /api/chat fly_to coordinates are valid for France (lat 41-51, lng -5 to 10)
POST /api/chat accepts history parameter for conversation context
POST /api/chat search results include meta information (total_results, strategy)
POST /api/chat handles empty message gracefully
Frontend: chatbot open button visible on dashboard (data-testid=chatbot-open-btn)
Frontend: clicking open button shows chatbot panel (data-testid=chatbot-panel)
Frontend: chatbot has input field (data-testid=chatbot-input)
Frontend: chatbot has send button (data-testid=chatbot-send-btn)
Frontend: chatbot has close button (data-testid=chatbot-close-btn)
Frontend: 4 quick action buttons visible (50MW en PACA, 20MW IDF rapide, Sites HdF réseau dispo, Résumé S3REnR)
Frontend: sending message shows loading state ('Analyse en cours...')
Frontend: search results show site cards with name, MW, score, saturation badge
Frontend: chatbot close button works correctly
Frontend: chatbot positioned at right=420px (doesn't overlap with sidebar at right=0px)
Frontend: map automatically flies to PACA region when PACA query is sent
Frontend: map automatically flies to IDF region when IDF query is sent
Frontend: map automatically flies to HdF region when HdF query is sent
Frontend: S3REnR summary displays region cards with status (SATURE/ACTIF)
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - uses dc_search_api.py for site data and s3renr_data.py for regional data
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Chatbot fully tested. Key endpoint: POST /api/chat with {message, session_id, history}. Response types: search_results (with fly_to), summary, text. Frontend component: ChatBot.js with data-testid attributes for all interactive elements. Chatbot positioned at right:420px to avoid sidebar overlap. LLM uses gpt-4.1-mini via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. Response time ~2-8 seconds.

frontend_verification.map_fly_to: FlyToTarget component handles auto-zoom based on fly_to coordinates in response
